- [saga-page](records/saga-page.md) `growth` `site` ‚Äî An auto-generated timeline of the workshop's own story ‚Äî ADRs, ships, kills, ceremonies.

- [weekly-shipnote](records/weekly-shipnote.md) `growth` `workflow+docs` ‚Äî A weekly digest the loop writes itself ‚Äî shipped, moved, killed, fuel ‚Äî posted as an issue every Monday.
